pkgmetadata.longdescription: HologramHologram is a lightweight library to generate Draft 7 compatible JSON Schemas from python 3.7 dataclasses. Python 3.6 is supported through the [dataclasses backport](httpsgithub.comericvsmithdataclasses). It is forked from [dataclasses-jsonschema](httpsgithub.coms-knibbsdataclasses-jsonschema) created by [s-knibbs](httpsgithub.coms-knibbs).
